name: Operion AI Lead Acquisition + Outreach Runtime
description: n8n-ready workflow contract for lead discovery, enrichment, SDR prep, SendGrid delivery, reply classification, and founder escalation.

webhooks.notes: Create or run source discovery jobs for Apollo, Google Maps, website extraction, or future directory connectors.
Run normalization, duplicate detection, quality scoring, contact confidence scoring, and enrichment persistence.
Generate Claude-powered outreach, create approval request, and enqueue approved-ready SDR email records.
Send queued, due, approved outreach through SendGrid with retry and audit logging.
Classify inbound replies, score intent, suppress opt-outs, and escalate hot leads.
